objective: dogfood Campfire on itself and harden lifecycle verification coverage

current.milestone_title: Add an automation prompt helper that emits task-only recurring prompt variants from Campfire state
current.slice_title: Add a helper under skills/task-handoff-state/scripts that prints recurring automation prompt variants for an existing task slug without mixing schedule or workspace into the prompt body
acceptance_criteria: Campfire provides a reusable helper that prints at least rolling_resume, verifier_sweep, and backlog_refresh prompt variants from existing task state
The helper keeps schedule and workspace out of the prompt body while targeting a concrete .autonomous/<task>/ directory
The generic task-state skill and repo docs can point to the helper once it exists

queued_milestones.milestone_title: Add deterministic verification for automation prompt helper variants and task-state selection
Document automation prompt helper usage in README and example guidance
Expose automation prompt helper guidance from resume_task.sh for rolling tasks
Add deterministic verification that resume_task.sh surfaces automation-helper guidance correctly

execution.notes: Dynamic queue replenishment is enabled. Autonomous rolling runs now target longer unattended work with stronger runtime and milestone floors while the deferred automation-helper backlog resumes with a deeper queue.

last_run.summary: Course-corrected the backlog toward autonomous rolling floors, completed milestones 021 through 023, restored the deferred automation-helper backlog with a deeper queue, and then paused with milestone-024 ready.
last_run.next_step: Add the automation prompt helper, then verify it, document it, and expose it through resume guidance.

validation.summary: Replenished the rolling queue with the next automation-pattern backlog.
Recorded the priority shift from automation-helper work to the more urgent autonomous rolling floor backlog.
Restored the deferred automation-helper backlog with a deeper queue after the autonomy floor backlog validated.
Recorded the earlier rolling stop-reason fix so auto-advance and bounded reframe remain mid-run events.
Rolling-mode helper verifier passed with the stronger autonomy floor defaults.
Evaluation note confirms the autonomous rolling-floor backlog is complete.
Rolling execution verifier now treats auto-advance as a run event and pauses for a real terminal reason.
Rolling reframe verifier now treats bounded reframe as a run event and preserves the replenished queue.
Repo verification passed after the autonomous rolling-floor policy, verifier, and example updates.
Evaluation note confirms the worktree-aware backlog is complete.
